query: SELECT 'breaking_news' as tipo, COUNT(*) as totale, MAX(createdAt) as ultima FROM breaking_news WHERE isActive=1 UNION ALL SELECT 'daily_editorial', COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM daily_editorial UNION ALL SELECT 'startup_of_day', COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM startup_of_day UNION ALL SELECT 'weekly_reportage', COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM weekly_reportage;
